purpose: Prevent oversized turns, streaming interruptions, write-lane mismatches, and cumulative-bundle bloat in governed prompt/OS workflows.
root_causes_addressed: recursive broad/deep requests executed in a single turn
overlong responses that keep streaming open unnecessarily
delivery_risk_triggers: recursive and broad and deep until all avenues are optimized
repair everything and improve anything else
large cumulative bundle creation including prior bundles
multiple implementation stages in one turn
simultaneous OS-tree patching and heavy top-level packaging through a non-verified write lane
required_mitigations: convert broad goals into a bounded current stage plus explicit next legal stage
write a compact execution-status packet instead of a long prose recap when risk is high
build only an active-only cumulative checkpoint
probe write lane directly before OS-tree writes when tool context changes
defer secondary improvements to later stages once primary bounded stage passes
final_response_shape: one next correct command unless multiple real options are necessary
